nasb.text: Yet in spite of this, when they are in the land of their enemies, I will not reject them, nor will I so abhor them as to destroy them, breaking My covenant with them; for I am the Lord their God.

esv.text: Yet for all that, when they are in the land of their enemies, I will not spurn them, neither will I abhor them so as to destroy them utterly and break my covenant with them, for I am the Lord their God.

cnv.text: 雖然這樣，他們住在仇敵之地的時候，我還是不棄絕他們，也不厭棄他們，不把他們滅絕，我不會違背我與他們所立的約；因為我是耶和華他們的　神。

ccb.text: 然而，他们流落敌国的时候，我不会弃绝他们，不会因厌恶而毁灭他们，也不会违背我与他们所立的约。我是他们的上帝耶和华。
